title: hibiscus tiliaceus subsp. tiliaceus
intro: Hibiscus tiliaceus subsp. tiliaceus, also known as the beach hibiscus or sea hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of hibiscus tiliaceus subsp. tiliaceus include reducing high blood pressure, lowering cholesterol levels, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
